assertions.expectation: Starts with pre-flight checks: current versions, cluster health, node status
assertions.reason: Phase 1 includes comprehensive pre-flight checks with gcloud describe command for versions, kubectl get nodes for status, and kubectl get pods for system health

assertions.expectation: Includes the gcloud command to check available versions in the release channel
assertions.reason: Step 1.2 provides 'gcloud container get-server-config --zone us-west1-b --format="yaml(channels.REGULAR)"' to check available versions

assertions.expectation: Includes the API deprecation check command before upgrading
assertions.reason: Step 1.4 includes the kubectl command to check for deprecated APIs using metrics endpoint

assertions.expectation: Provides the exact gcloud command for control plane upgrade to 1.31 first (--master flag)
assertions.reason: The response addresses upgrading from 1.32 to 1.32 (same version) and shows example commands for future upgrades, but doesn't provide the specific 1.30→1.31 upgrade command as expected

assertions.expectation: Includes a verification step after control plane upgrade with expected output
assertions.reason: Step 4.1 includes verification after control plane upgrade using gcloud describe command with format to check currentMasterVersion

assertions.expectation: Provides gcloud commands for node pool upgrades — may use skip-level (N+2) for node pools to reduce steps
assertions.reason: Step 4.2 provides specific gcloud container node-pools upgrade commands for both node pools, though doesn't explicitly mention skip-level capability

assertions.expectation: Includes monitoring commands to watch node pool upgrade progress
assertions.reason: Step 4.2 includes 'watch' command to monitor node upgrade progress with nodepool labels

assertions.expectation: Provides sequential control plane upgrades (1.30→1.31→1.32) with option for skip-level node pool upgrades
assertions.reason: The response doesn't provide sequential upgrades from 1.30→1.31→1.32 as the user's cluster is already at 1.32. It shows future upgrade pattern but not the specific sequential path expected

assertions.expectation: Includes post-upgrade validation: node versions, pod health, kube-system pods
assertions.reason: Step 4.3 includes comprehensive post-upgrade validation with commands to check node pool versions, node status, and pod health across all namespaces

assertions.expectation: Provides a rollback section explaining what to do if something goes wrong
assertions.reason: The response includes troubleshooting commands but lacks a dedicated rollback section explaining rollback procedures or commands
